channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ontario Premier explores creating artificial land in Lake Ontario for new Toronto convention centre
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford has confirmed he is considering the creation of artificial land in Lake Ontario to build a multibillion-dollar convention centre on Toronto’s waterfront. Speaking to reporter...

item.title: Firecracker Unit Blast in Vetlapalem Kills 28 Workers Due to Safety Violations
item.description: In Vetlapalem village of Kakinada district, Andhra Pradesh, a catastrophic explosion at the Sri Surya Fireworks unit on February 28, 2026, claimed 28 lives, including eight women. Preliminary investig...

item.title: AC Milan triumphs in marathon penalty shootout to enter Europa League group stage
item.description: AC Milan avoided elimination in the preliminary round of the Europa League by scoring a last-minute penalty in extra time and eventually winning a dramatic 24-kick shootout 9-8 against Rio Ave. The se...

item.title: HESLB Encourages Students to Combat Gender-Based Violence and Supports Girls’ Education
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, the Higher Education Students' Loans Board (HESLB) has called on students to actively take part in preventing gender-based violence (GBV) and promoting awareness in their communities...

item.title: Moja Expressway Waives Toll Fees for Two Hours Due to Flooding on Mombasa Road from Heavy Rains
item.description: On the evening of Friday, March 6, 2026, Nairobi motorists got a bit of relief when Moja Expressway, the operators of the Nairobi Expressway, announced a temporary waiver of toll charges. Due to heavy...

item.title: Bothaville Spar employee allegedly assaulted following refusal to take breathalyzer
item.description: A serious incident occurred at a Spar store in Bothaville, Free State, where a general employee, Tommy Morapedi, was allegedly assaulted by a security manager after refusing to take a breathalyzer tes...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Moves Cargo to Rail to Reduce Lorry Congestion
item.description: Dar es Salaam government imeanza mpango mkubwa wa kupunguza foleni kubwa ya malori kwenye miji. Kwa sasa, zaidi ya asilimia 90 ya mizigo inatoka bandarini kupitia barabara, jambo linalochangia barabar...

item.title: China’s cautious stance on Iran reflects strategic limits and transactional diplomacy
item.description: China has maintained a restrained position regarding the U.S.-Israeli military campaign in Iran, balancing doctrinal principles against its limited influence in the region. While China officially oppo...

item.title: Two IAF pilots die in Sukhoi crash during training sortie in Assam
item.description: Squadron Leader Anuj Vashishth and Flight Lieutenant Purvesh Duragkar, both young officers of the Indian Air Force and participants in Operation Sindoor last year, tragically lost their lives on Thurs...

item.title: UK Political Debate Over Involvement in US-Israeli Actions Against Iran
item.description: The article discusses the intense political pressure in the United Kingdom over its stance on US-Israeli military actions against Iran. Marina Hyde satirically criticises politicians who demand immedi...

item.title: African Court Orders Tanzania to Allow Legal Challenges to Presidential Elections
item.description: The African Court on Human and Peoples’ Rights (AfCHPR) has found that Tanzania’s current constitution stops citizens from challenging presidential election results, which goes against basic human rig...

item.title: NHAI assures highways developers of steady fuel and bitumen supply amid cost pressures
item.description: The National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) has assured highway developers that the supply of fuel, bitumen, and other essential materials will remain uninterrupted despite rising costs. This assu...

item.title: PNP and MMDA Enhance Healthcare Access for Officers and Families
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) and the Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA) have recently expanded healthcare services for their personnel and their dependents to ensure better acces...

item.title: Home And Away Films Episodes in Western Australia Featuring Brax and Ricky
item.description: The beloved Australian soap opera Home And Away returns to screens this week with highly anticipated episodes filmed in Western Australia. Stephen Peacocke and Bonnie Sveen reprise their roles as Brax...

item.title: Trump demands Iran's unconditional surrender as Middle East conflict escalates
item.description: US President Donald Trump has declared that only an unconditional surrender by Iran would end the ongoing Middle East conflict, now in its seventh day. The war has expanded beyond Iran and Israel, aff...

item.title: Supreme Court Grants Asylum-Seeking Parents in Quebec Access to Subsidized Daycare
item.description: The Supreme Court of Canada has ruled that Quebec cannot exclude asylum seekers from accessing the province’s subsidized daycare system. In an 8-1 decision, Justice Andromache Karakatsanis concluded t...

item.title: Iran's Actions Escalate Middle East Conflict with Global Implications
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East escalated rapidly following joint U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran on February 28, prompting retaliatory attacks by Iran and its proxies across the region. Hezbollah's ...

item.title: Efforts and Challenges in Reforming the Nigeria Police Force under Kayode Egbetokun
item.description: The office of the Inspector-General of Police (IGP) for Naija na one of the most stressful public positions, carrying heavy responsibility for public safety, national security, and citizen trust. When...

item.title: Escalating US-Israel-Iran Conflict: Casualties, Strikes, and International Tensions
item.description: The conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran has intensified dramatically, with heavy casualties and international concerns mounting. US President Donald Trump has insisted that no deal with Iran is ...

item.title: Gachagua Pays Tribute to Johanna Ng'eno, Criticises Political Hypocrisy
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has announced he will not attend the funeral of the late Emurua Dikirr MP Johanna Ng'eno, condemning political rivals who he says persecuted Ng'eno during his ...
